sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No.341 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh Case 1. For order on office objection 2. For order on CMA No.2271/2025 3. For order on CMA No.2272/2025 4. For hearing of main case 04.05.2026 None present Matter is pending since 2025 without any progress. Diary demonstrates that at no point since inception no efforts have been made by the applicant to even have the matter listed or heard. Even today the applicant remains unrepresented without any intimation and or justification. It appears that the applicant is not interested to proceed with this reference. Therefore, in view of the judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Asif
